function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Please reply with the linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_19__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_21__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_19__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 4 invoices linked to Claudia.

Best,
Assistant

next_step.current_state: Outbox draft was written; need verification by reading the file (without rewriting) and then complete cleanup.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read written outbox file to verify fields/order
next_step.observation: Outbound email file write completed at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Verified outbox file: attachment paths were read, order is newest-first among selected oldest-4 set, recipient and subject formatting valid. Final cleanup step is deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Read back outbound file and confirmed it contains four Claudia-linked invoice attachments and quoted subject with colon-space.

next_step.current_state: Task fully completed: processed next inbox item, handled requested invoice bundle reply as durable outbox draft, and removed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing outbound draft creation.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by creating an outbound email draft with the requested oldest 4 Claudia-linked invoices attached, then deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS.MD files when entering folders, used inbox-email frontmatter as canonical metadata, processed all 6 preflight-listed related finance files for completeness, created outbound email in 60_outbox/outbox with required schema, kept attachments newest-first, and deleted inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox item 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md requested replying with the oldest 4 invoices linked to Claudia. Canonical sender miles@novak.example matched 10_entities/cast/miles.md. Claudia entity was confirmed in 10_entities/cast/claudia.md. All 6 preflight-listed Claudia-linked invoices were read, oldest four identified by issue date (2025-11-19, 2025-12-21, 2026-01-19, 2026-02-19), and attached in required newest-first order inside the selected set in 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md. After successful write and verification readback, inbox file was deleted per workflow.
completed_steps_laconic: read canonical entities miles and claudia
read back written outbox file for verification
